cms.task_text: Tečkovaná čára má nakreslit [hlp]6 čárek[/hlp], ale smyčka se opakuje jen 3×. Opravte počet opakování.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">6</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_pen_down"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">20</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up"><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">15</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
